name: real-cross-device-acceptance
title: 真实跨设备验收
description: 在真实桌面和手机浏览器、同一真实账号上验证自建歌单的新建、编辑、排序、删除、离线恢复和并发冲突，保留可核验证据并清理测试数据。
scope: Real production acceptance across the user's desktop Chrome and physical mobile browser, including online propagation, offline outbox recovery, optimistic conflict, explicit resolution, deletion tombstone propagation, evidence, cleanup, and release documentation.
